tools.name: get_system_health
tools.description: Get the health status of SonarQube Server instance. Returns GREEN (fully operational), YELLOW (usable but needs attention), or RED (not operational).

tools.name: get_system_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about system configuration including JVM state, database, search indexes, and settings. Requires 'Administer' permissions.

tools.name: get_system_logs
tools.description: Get system logs in plain-text format. Requires system administration permission.

name.description: Name of the logs to get. Possible values: access, app, ce, deprecation, es, web. Default: app

tools.name: ping_system
tools.description: Ping the SonarQube Server system to check if it's alive. Returns 'pong' as plain text.

tools.name: get_system_status
tools.description: Get state information about SonarQube Server. Returns status (STARTING, UP, DOWN, RESTARTING, DB_MIGRATION_NEEDED, DB_MIGRATION_RUNNING), version, and id.

tools.name: change_sonar_issue_status
tools.description:
Change the status of a Sonar issue. This tool can be used to change the status of an issue to "accept", "falsepositive" or to "reopen" an issue.
An example request could be: I would like to accept the issue having the key "AX-HMISMFixnZED"

key.description: The key of the issue which status should be changed

status.description: The new status of the issue

tools.name: search_my_sonarqube_projects
tools.description: Find Sonar projects. The response is paginated.

page.description: An optional page number. Defaults to 1.

tools.name: search_sonar_issues_in_projects
tools.description: Search for Sonar issues in my organization's projects.

p.description: An optional page number. Defaults to 1.

projects.description: An optional list of Sonar projects to look in

ps.description: An optional page size. Must be greater than 0 and less than or equal to 500. Defaults to 100.

pullRequestId.description: The identifier of the Pull Request to look in

tools.name: get_project_quality_gate_status
tools.description: Get the Quality Gate Status for the project. Either 'analysisId', 'projectId' or 'projectKey' must be provided.

projectKey.description: The optional project key to get the status for, for example 'my_project'

analysisId.description: The optional analysis ID to get the status for, for example 'AU-TpxcA-iU5OvuD2FL1'

branch.description: The optional branch key to get the status for, for example 'feature/my_branch'

projectId.description: The optional project ID to get the status for, for example 'AU-Tpxb--iU5OvuD2FLy'. Doesn't work with branches or pull requests.

pullRequest.description: The optional pull request ID to get the status for, for example '5461'

tools.name: show_rule
tools.description: Shows detailed information about a SonarQube rule

tools.name: list_rule_repositories
tools.description: List rule repositories available in SonarQube

q.description: Optional search query to filter repositories by name or key

language.description: Optional language key to filter repositories (e.g. 'java')

tools.name: list_quality_gates
tools.description: List all quality gates in the organization

tools.name: list_languages
tools.description: List all programming languages supported in this instance

q.description: Optional pattern to match language keys/names against

tools.name: analyze_code_snippet
tools.description: Analyze a code snippet with Sonar analyzers to find Sonar issues in it.

codeSnippet.description: Code snippet or full file content

tools.name: get_component_measures
tools.description: Get measures for a component (project, directory, file).

component.description: The component key to get measures for

metricKeys.description: The metric keys to retrieve (e.g. nloc, complexity, violations, coverage)

branch.description: The branch to analyze for measures

pullRequest.description: The pull request identifier to analyze for measures

ps.description: Page size. Must be greater than 0 and less than or equal to 500 (default: 100)

tools.name: get_scm_info
tools.description: Get SCM information of source files. Require See Source Code permission on file's project

commits_by_line.description: Group lines by SCM commit if value is false, else display commits for each line (true/false)

from.description: First line to return. Starts at 1

tools.name: get_raw_source
tools.description: Get source code as raw text. Require 'See Source Code' permission on file
